  • Uses of KeYSelectionListener in de.uka.ilkd.key.core

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.core with parameters of type KeYSelectionListener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    KeYMediator.addKeYSelectionListener(KeYSelectionListener listener)
    adds a listener to the KeYSelectionModel, so that the listener will be informed if the proof or node the user has selected changed
    void
    KeYSelectionModel.addKeYSelectionListener(KeYSelectionListener listener)
     
    void
    KeYMediator.addKeYSelectionListenerChecked(KeYSelectionListener listener)
    adds a listener to the KeYSelectionModel, so that the listener will be informed if the proof or node the user has selected changed adds the listener only if it not already registered
    void
    KeYSelectionModel.addKeYSelectionListenerChecked(KeYSelectionListener listener)
     
    void
    KeYMediator.removeKeYSelectionListener(KeYSelectionListener listener)
    removes a listener from the KeYSelectionModel
    void
    KeYSelectionModel.removeKeYSelectionListener(KeYSelectionListener listener)
